paper.title: Analysis of strength development in cement-stabilized silty clay from microstructural considerations
paper.authors: Suksun Horpibulsuk; Runglawan Rachan; Avirut Chinkulkijniwat; Yuttana Raksachon; Apichat Suddeepong
paper.notes: Unconfined compressive strength results are presented in figures; packet lacks readable numeric values for mixture-level extraction.

strength_results.notes: Unconfined compressive strength plots for cement-stabilized silty clay are figure-only in the packet; mixture labels, ages, and values require digitization.

figures.caption: candidate compressive-strength figure/page
figures.notes: Packet flags candidate compressive-strength page/figure, but numeric values are not readable.

evidence.evidence_text: Unconfined compressive strength results are presented in figures; packet lacks readable numeric values for mixture-level extraction.

review_queue.question: Digitize the compressive-strength figures to recover mixture-level values and ages.
review_queue.suggested_action: Open source PDF figures, read axis scales and series labels, then add figure_digitized_approx or exact values if tables are found.

main_risks: Some strength information is incomplete, secondary, or figure-only in the packet.
